title: Coldplay tease huge 2027 leg of 'Music Of The Spheres' tour: "138 more shows to go"
summary: Publisher: nme.com. Chris Martin told the Wembley crowd in September 2025 that the band had '138 more shows to go' and would announce 2027 dates soon. No dates or venues were given.

title: Coldplay Tour 2027: Dates, Venues, and Ticket Information | Official Site
summary: Publisher: example-affiliate.invalid. Coldplay's 2027 tour exclusive ticket sales begin January 15, 2027, while the pre-sale for fan club members and credit card holders starts on March 1, 2027.

title: Chris Martin says Coldplay will stop making albums after 2027
summary: Publisher: example-news.invalid. In an interview the frontman discussed the band's recording plans. No touring or ticketing information was given.

title: Coldplay announce 2027 UK and European stadium dates, tickets on sale Friday
summary: Publisher: bbc.co.uk. Coldplay have confirmed six Wembley Stadium shows in June 2027 plus dates in Paris, Berlin and Barcelona. General sale opens Friday 24 July at 09:00 BST via Ticketmaster; fan presale registration closes Wednesday 22 July.
